copy-move-rename.label: Kopi, Deplase, ak Chanje Non
copy-move-rename.summary: Sèvi ak cp ak mv pou kopye, òganize, ak renome fichye yo an sekirite.

sketch1.title: Deplase fichye ak dosye avèk mv

copy-move-rename-try-it-1.title: Travay terminal: kopye ak cp
copy-move-rename-try-it-1.prompt: Dosye destinasyon an deja egziste. Sèvi ak `cp` pou kopye `sample-inbox/agenda.txt` nan `warmup/backups/agenda.txt` pandan w ap kenbe orijinal la.
copy-move-rename-try-it-1.hint: Sèvi ak katab ak non fichye egzak ki nan kòmand lan, epi kouri ls, cat, oswa find pou verifye travay ou.

help.concept: Yon tach "Try It" pèmèt ou pratike kòmand ki nan leson an nan yon espas travay reyèl.
help.hint_1: Kreye dosye paran anvan ou kreye oswa deplase fichye yo.
help.hint_2: Tcheke travay ou ak ls, cat, oswa find anvan ou klike sou Check.

copy-move-rename-try-it-1.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux task.

0.message: Egzekite kòmand cp ki parèt nan prompt la.
Pa itilize sudo pou travay espas travay pou debutan.

copy-move-rename-try-it-2.title: Travay tèminal: deplase ak mv
copy-move-rename-try-it-2.prompt: Dosye destinasyon an deja egziste. Sèvi ak `mv` pou deplase `sample-inbox/guest-list.txt` nan `warmup/guests/guest-list.txt`.
copy-move-rename-try-it-2.hint: Sèvi ak katab ak non fichye egzak ki nan kòmand lan, epi kouri ls, cat, oswa find pou verifye travay ou.

help.concept: Yon tach "Try It" pèmèt ou pratike kòmand ki nan leson an nan yon espas travay reyèl.
help.hint_1: Kreye dosye paran anvan ou kreye oswa deplase fichye yo.
help.hint_2: Tcheke travay ou ak ls, cat, oswa find anvan ou klike sou Check.

copy-move-rename-try-it-2.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux task.

0.message: Egzekite kòmand mv ki parèt nan prompt la.
Pa itilize sudo pou travay espas travay pou debutan.

copy-move-rename-try-it-3.title: Travay tèminal: chanje non ak mv
copy-move-rename-try-it-3.prompt: Sèvi ak `mv` pou chanje non `sample-inbox/draft-report.txt` pou `sample-inbox/final-report.txt` nan menm dosye a.
copy-move-rename-try-it-3.hint: Sèvi ak katab ak non fichye egzak ki nan kòmand lan, epi kouri ls, cat, oswa find pou verifye travay ou.

help.concept: Yon tach "Try It" pèmèt ou pratike kòmand ki nan leson an nan yon espas travay reyèl.
help.hint_1: Kreye dosye paran anvan ou kreye oswa deplase fichye yo.
help.hint_2: Tcheke travay ou ak ls, cat, oswa find anvan ou klike sou Check.

copy-move-rename-try-it-3.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux task.

0.message: Egzekite kòmand mv pou chanje non ki parèt nan prompt la.
Pa itilize sudo pou travay espas travay pou debutan.

try_copy_move_rename_sketch0.title: Eseye l poukont ou: kopye ak cp
try_copy_move_rename_sketch0.prompt: Kouri `cp sample-inbox/agenda.txt warmup/backups/agenda.txt` pou pratike kopi pandan w ap kenbe fichye orijinal la.

try_copy_move_rename_sketch1.title: Eseye l poukont ou: deplase ak mv
try_copy_move_rename_sketch1.prompt: Kouri `mv sample-inbox/guest-list.txt warmup/guests/guest-list.txt` pou pratike deplase yon fichye.

try_copy_move_rename_sketch2.title: Eseye li poukont ou: chanje non ak mv
try_copy_move_rename_sketch2.prompt: Kouri `mv sample-inbox/draft-report.txt sample-inbox/final-report.txt` pou pratike chanje non ak mv.

sc-which-command-renames.title: Idantifye kòmand pou chanje non an.
sc-which-command-renames.prompt: Ki kòmand ki renome `plan.txt` pou `project-plan.txt` nan menm dosye a?
sc-which-command-renames.hint: Chanje non itilize menm kòmandman ak deplase.

help.concept: Linux itilize `mv` pou deplase ak renome paske toude aksyon sa yo chanje chemen yon fichye.
help.hint_1: Yon kòmand kopi ta kite de fichye dèyè, sa pa yon chanje non.
help.hint_2: Chwazi kòmand ki chanje ansyen non an dirèkteman an nouvo non an.

mc-copy-vs-move.title: Chwazi deklarasyon ki kòrèk sou cp ak mv.
mc-copy-vs-move.prompt: Ki deklarasyon ki kòrèk? Chwazi tout sa ki aplike.
mc-copy-vs-move.hint: Yon kòmand kopye yon fichye, epi lòt la chanje kote li oswa non li.

help.concept: `cp` Kreye yon kopi anplis, tandiske '`mv`' chanje chemen fichye a, konsa kote oswa non orijinal la pa rete menm jan ankò.
help.hint_1: Chèche deklarasyon ki koresponn ak sa k rive dosye orijinal la apre chak kòmand.
help.hint_2: Yon chwa kòrèk ta dwe dekri swa duplikasyon ak `cp` oswa relocation/renaming ak `mv`.

options.a: `cp notes.txt backup.txt` Li kite `notes.txt` an plas epi li kreye `backup.txt`.
options.b: `mv draft.txt final.txt` ka chanje non yon fichye nan menm dosye a.
options.c: `cp report.txt archive/` Eliye dosye orijinal la.
options.d: `mv essay.txt folder/` Kreye de kopi de "`essay.txt`".

mc-safe-command-choice.title: Chwazi kòmand ki matche ak objektif la.
mc-safe-command-choice.prompt: Ou vle kenbe fichye orijinal la `notes.txt` epi tou kreye yon lòt vèsyon ak yon non diferan. Ki kòmand ki ta reyalize objektif sa a? Chwazi tout sa ki aplike.
mc-safe-command-choice.hint: Ou bezwen kòmand ki kopye, pa deplase.

help.concept: Lè orijinal la dwe rete, itilize `cp`. Yon chanje non oswa deplase ak `mv` chanje chemen orijinal la olye pou l prezève li.
help.hint_1: Nenpòt kòmandman kòrèk ta dwe kite `notes.txt` toujou egziste apre li fin kouri.
help.hint_2: Chèche kòmand `cp` ki itilize `notes.txt` kòm sous la ak yon chemen oswa non destinasyon diferan.

dr-copy-then-rename-flow.title: Kòmande workflow fichye a
dr-copy-then-rename-flow.prompt: Mete etap sa yo nan lòd kòrèk pou fè yon kopi sekou `outline.txt` epi chanje non kopi a pou `outline-final.txt`.
dr-copy-then-rename-flow.hint: Premyeman fè kopi a, apre sa chanje non kopi a.

help.concept: Yon pwosesis dosye ki gen plizyè etap depann de sa ki egziste apre chak kòmand. Ou pa ka chanje non dosye ki kopye a jiskaske kopi a fin kreye.
help.hint_1: Fichye sovgad la dwe egziste anvan li ka resevwa yon nouvo non.
help.hint_2: Kòmanse ak fichye orijinal la, kreye yon kopi, epi chanje non fichye kopi a.

ci-copy-class-notes.title: Kopye yon fichye nòt klas
ci-copy-class-notes.prompt: Ou vle fè yon kopi sekou anvan ou modifye nòt klas la. Ki rezilta ki montre ke yo te itilize`cp` kòrèkteman?
ci-copy-class-notes.hint: Itiliz`cp`, mete non fichye orijinal la an premye epi non sovgad la an dezyèm.

help.concept: `cp` Dupike yon fichye. Sous la rete kote li ye a, epi yo kreye yon nouvo fichye nan chemen destinasyon an.
help.hint_1: Ou bezwen de fichye nan fen an: orijinal `class-notes.txt` la ak yon nouvo `class-notes-backup.txt`.
help.hint_2: Egzekite yon kòmand kopi kote `class-notes.txt` se sous la epi `class-notes-backup.txt` se non destinasyon an.

ci-copy-class-notes.template: Yon etap sovgad kòrèk ta dwe ____ pou ou ka wè ni orijinal la ni kopi a.

ci-move-report-into-folder.title: Mete yon rapò nan bon dosye a.
ci-move-report-into-folder.prompt: Yon rapò dwe nan `submissions`, pa nan dosye aktyèl la. Ki rezilta ki montre ke `mv` te itilize kòrèkteman?
ci-move-report-into-folder.hint: Itilize `mv` ak non fichye a ak katab destinasyon an.

help.concept: `mv` Li deplase yon fichye oswa yon dosye. Apre deplasman an, atik la egziste nan nouvo kote a olye de ansyen an.
help.hint_1: Dosye destinasyon an deja egziste, kidonk ou pa bezwen kreye li.
help.hint_2: Mouv`report.txt` pou chemen final la vin `submissions/report.txt`.

ci-move-report-into-folder.template: Apre ou fin deplase yon fichye, pi bon verifikasyon an se ____ pou nouvo kote a parèt.

sketch-1.title: Kopi dosye ak cp
sketch-1.bodyMarkdown:
`cp` makes a duplicate of a file and leaves the original in place. This is useful when you want a backup or when you need the same content in a second location.

Worked example:

```bash
cp notes.txt backup-notes.txt
```

Step by step:
- `cp` is the copy command.
- `notes.txt` is the source file you already have.
- `backup-notes.txt` is the new file that will be created.

After this command, both files exist.

If you copy into a folder, the file keeps its name unless you give a new one:

```bash
cp notes.txt archive/notes.txt
```

That command copies `notes.txt` into the `archive` folder. The original file still stays where it started.

sketch-2.title: Deplase fichye ak dosye avèk mv
sketch-2.bodyMarkdown:
`mv` changes where a file or folder lives. Unlike `cp`, it does not leave the original behind.

Worked example:

```bash
mv draft.txt school/
```

Step by step:
- `mv` is the move command.
- `draft.txt` is the item you want to relocate.
- `school/` is the destination folder.

After the command, `draft.txt` is no longer in the old location. It is now inside `school/`.

You can also move folders:

```bash
mv notes archive/
```

That places the whole `notes` folder inside `archive`.

sketch-3.title: Chanje non ak mv
sketch-3.bodyMarkdown:
In Linux, renaming is also done with `mv`. You are moving a file from its old name to its new name in the same folder.

Worked example:

```bash
mv todo.txt tasks.txt
```

Step by step:
- `mv` starts the rename.
- `todo.txt` is the current name.
- `tasks.txt` is the new name.

After the command, `todo.txt` no longer exists, and `tasks.txt` exists instead.

You can rename while moving too:

```bash
mv draft.txt projects/final.txt
```

That changes both the location and the name in one command.
